title: Sesame Chicken
ingredients: 6 chicken breast halves, boneless, skinless and cut into bite-sized pieces
instructions: Combine the sugar and soy sauce in a small saucepan and heat until sugar dissolves completely.
Remove from heat and stir in sesame oil and sesame seeds.
Cover the sauce to keep warm.
Place flour in a large plastic bag and season with salt and pepper.
Dredge chicken pieces with the flour mixture.
Heat the oil in a large frying pan.
Shake excess flour off of chicken pieces.
Working in batches, fry chicken pieces until golden on all sides, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain the cooked chicken on paper towels and set aside, covering to keep warm until all chicken is cooked.
Toss the chicken with the sauce to coat well.
Place on platter to serve and top with chopped scallions.
notes: Work in batches when frying to avoid overcrowding the pan
Cover cooked chicken to keep it warm while cooking remaining batches
